# sivui2 – Parturikampaamo Website

## Project Overview
Responsive barbershop/hair salon website built with ASP.NET Core (C#) backend and React/JavaScript frontend.

## Tech Stack
- **Backend:** C# / ASP.NET Core (serves static files & API)
- **Frontend:** React + JavaScript (Vite)
- **Styling:** CSS Modules / plain CSS

## Key Features
- Responsive layout: left sidebar on desktop, top navbar on mobile
- Sections: Etusivu, Palvelut, Ajanvaraus
- Smooth scroll navigation
- Footer with privacy policy & self-monitoring links

## Navigation
- Desktop: Fixed left sidebar with logo placeholder, company name, nav links
- Mobile: Fixed top navbar with hamburger or inline links

## Notes
- Company logo and name are placeholders — replace later
- Ajanvaraus section is a placeholder for future booking integration
